Title: Apply → Verify → Approve/Reject → Grant
Scenario: Student submits MCM application → Assistant verifies → Convener approves → Merit list generated with approved student
Expected Final State: MCM application status=approved; all intermediate statuses correctly transitioned (pending → verified → approved)

Title: Apply → Verify → Approve/Reject → Grant
Scenario: Student submits MCM application → Assistant verifies → Convener rejects → Student notified of rejection
Expected Final State: MCM application status=rejected; no merit list entry; status transitioned (pending → verified → rejected)

Title: Amend / Withdraw Pending
Scenario: Assistant reverts MCM application → Student edits reverted application → Status returns to pending → Assistant re-verifies
Expected Final State: Application status=verified after full amend cycle; transitions: pending → reverted → pending → verified

Title: Amend / Withdraw Pending
Scenario: Student attempts to modify an application that is already approved (finalized) → System blocks the update
Expected Final State: Application status unchanged (remains approved); update rejected with finalization error
